title: The Problem Solvers: Michele Catasta at Replit
summary: Michele Catasta of Replit discusses his vision of democratizing software development through agentic building. Replit partnered with Anthropic in early 2024 to leverage Claude for coding capabilities, enabling over 40 million users to build software in natural language without coding experience.
